text: 人最宝贵的是生命，生命属于人只有一次。人的一生应当这样度过：当他回首往事的时候，不因虚度年华而悔恨，也不因碌碌无为而羞愧。
author: 奥斯特洛夫斯基

text: I think, therefore I am.
author: 笛卡尔 (René Descartes)

text: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
author: 富兰克林·D·罗斯福

text: Existence precedes essence.
author: 让-保罗·萨特 (Jean-Paul Sartre)

text: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: 约瑟夫·坎贝尔 (Joseph Campbell)

text: You can't go back and change the beginning, but you can start where you are and change the ending.
author: C.S.路易斯

text: We are not makers of history. We are made by history.
author: 马丁·路德·金

text: The only way out is through.
author: 罗伯特·弗罗斯特 (Robert Frost)

text: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
author: 王尔德 (Oscar Wilde)

text: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife.
author: 简·奥斯汀 (Jane Austen)

text: Happy families are all alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
author: 列夫·托尔斯泰 (Leo Tolstoy)

text: It was the best of times, it was the worst of times.
author: 查尔斯·狄更斯 (Charles Dickens)

text: All this happened, more or less.
author: 库特·冯内古特 (Kurt Vonnegut)

text: The fault, dear Brutus, is not in our stars, but in ourselves.
author: 莎士比亚 (William Shakespeare)

text: To be, or not to be, that is the question.
author: 莎士比亚 (William Shakespeare)

text: Call me Ishmael.
author: 赫尔曼·梅尔维尔 (Herman Melville)

text: It was love at first sight. The first time Yossarian saw the chaplain, he fell madly in love with him.
author: 约瑟夫·海勒 (Joseph Heller)

text: Nothing is true. Everything is permitted.
author: 威廉·布洛夫 (William S. Burroughs)

text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
author: 佛陀 (Buddha)

text: The only constant in life is change.
author: 赫拉克利特 (Heraclitus)

text: I am, I exist, is necessarily true whenever it is put forward by me or conceived in my mind.
author: 笛卡尔

text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: 苏格拉底 (Socrates)

text: The knowledge of oneself is the beginning of wisdom.
author: 柏拉图 (Plato)

text: A man is not finished when he is defeated. He is finished when he quits.
author: 理查德·尼克松

text: The mind is a museum of possibilities.
author: 心理学原理

text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: 塞内加 (Seneca)

text: The obstacle is the way.
author: 马库斯·奥勒留 (Marcus Aurelius)

text: Perfect is the enemy of good.
author: 伏尔泰 (Voltaire)

text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: 威廉·詹姆士 (William James)

text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
author: 海伦·凯勒 (Helen Keller)

text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: 苏格拉底

text: The function of education is to teach one to think intensively and to think critically.
author: 马丁·路德·金

text: Everything can be taken from a man but one thing: the last of the human freedoms—to choose one's attitude.
author: 维克多·弗兰克尔 (Viktor Frankl)

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: 富兰克林·D·罗斯福

text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
author: 美国民谚

text: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
author: 鲁米 (Rumi)

text: Being and nothingness are not opposed but complementary.
author: 现代哲学

text: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
author: 蒂姆·费里斯 (Tim Ferriss)

text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
author: 孔子 (慧语版)

text: Whatever the mind of man can conceive and believe, it can achieve.
author: 拿破仑·希尔 (Napoleon Hill)

text: The greatest discovery of my generation is that a person can change his life by merely changing his attitude.
author: 威廉·詹姆士

text: Do not go gentle into that good night.
author: 迪兰·托马斯 (Dylan Thomas)

text: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I took the one less traveled by.
author: 罗伯特·弗罗斯特

text: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. 托尔金 (J.R.R. Tolkien)

text: It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
author: J.K. 罗琳 (J.K. Rowling)

text: Some people are worth melting for.
author: 心理学与文学

text: You have within you right now, everything you need to deal with whatever the world can throw at you.
author: 布赖恩·特雷西 (Brian Tracy)

text: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: 约瑟夫·坎贝尔

text: In a world where you can be anything, be kind.
author: 詹妮弗·邓恩 (Jennifer Dukes Lee)

text: The paradox is only a conflict between reality and your feeling of what reality ought to be.
author: 理查德·费曼 (Richard Feynman)
